_verification.note: Cross-checked this pass (2026-07-22) against a direct mcp__supabase__list_tables read — every table named here exists live with the columns implied. The 'Layouts / Boards' domain-object naming inherits the unresolved Board/Asset architecture decision documented in docs/api/v2/README.md; that naming ambiguity is the one open item, not a factual error in this file.

note: Mapping of live Supabase schema objects to domain concepts used by Scena's current edge functions and planned API.

domainObjects.purpose: Team metadata, membership, roles, plan entitlements, and limits.
Physical deployment sites for Displays, Menus, Scenes, Layouts, and Sessions.
Kiosk registration, device credentials, pairing codes, and assignment state.
Menu-driven content scenes rendered to displays.
Uploaded presentation files, LXC manifest references, and ready/failed processing state.
Content scenes referencing menus or presentation assets for display playback.
Board layout definitions and tile placement for display composition.
Active live sessions that assign displays to layouts, modes, and screens.
Scheduled actions that start/stop sessions, set layouts, and enable/disable screens.
Stripe plan pricing, checkout session lifecycle, and subscription persistence.
Stripe webhook deduplication, processing state, and notification dispatch.

databaseFunctions.name: finalize_paid_team_subscription
databaseFunctions.purpose: Finalizes a Stripe Checkout session into a paid Team and workspace subscription record.

databaseFunctions.name: sync_paid_team_subscription
databaseFunctions.purpose: Synchronizes Stripe subscription fields into the local subscription record.
